name: One-Eyed Skill Gainer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>隻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のスキル・ゲイナー
desc:
3 Level 4 monsters
You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card to target 1 face-up Xyz Monster your opponent controls; this card's name and original effect become the same as that monster. This effect can only be used once while this card is face-up on the field.
mnst_eff:
3 Level 4 monsters

eff:

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
misc: Once while face-up on the field
